title: Cleistogenes songorica
taxonomy: Cleistogenes songorica is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to China and Kazakhstan. The species was first described by the Russian botanist, Nikolai Nikolaievich Tzvelev. The classification of Cleistogenes songorica is further divided into its kingdom (Plantae), phylum (Magnoliophyta), class (Liliopsida), and order (Poales). Cleistogenes songorica is also known as Songor grass.
